primary_text:
We can't promise returns. No one honestly can with a startup.

Here's what we can show you: 50+ regenerative farms. 2,000+ customers. A Brookvale hub operating five days a week. A model that connects farms directly to families.

FarmThru is opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal in July 2026. From $50, capped at $10K.

We believe in what we're building. If you want to see the full picture before deciding, join the waitlist.

Not financial advice.
headline: We can't promise returns
description: Honest about the risks. Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026.
creative_brief: Clean white background with honest, direct copy as hero. Small product photo below. Trust-building through simplicity and transparency.
